summary: The test suite completely ignores the instruction to strictly test through the GitHub Actions workflow via 'act' ('Do NOT test your script directly'), falling back to standard unit tests. While the unit tests are cleanly structured, the mandatory workflow structure tests (YAML parsing, actionlint) are entirely missing. Furthermore, the standalone 'run-act-tests.ts' script employs incredibly weak assertions (e.g., checking if output includes any of several hardcoded versions) that explicitly violate the requirement to verify exact expected values.
